name: PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk
summary: PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk manufactures and sells plywood and related wood products in Indonesia. The company offers general and polyester plywood, blockboard polyester, and floorbase products, as well as structured panels and blockboards. It also exports its products to the United States, Japan, and Europe. The company was formerly known as PT Tirta Mahakam Plywood Industry. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Tirta Mahakam Resources Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Harita Jayaraya.
